tasks.label: xex: build debug (arena_native)
tasks.command: cmake -B build-atari-debug -G Ninja -DCMAKE_TOOLCHAIN_FILE=cmake/atari-toolchain.cmake -DEDGE_BUILD_DEMO=ON -DEDGE_DEBUG=ON && cmake --build build-atari-debug --target arena_native
tasks.detail: Configure + build the DWARF debug variant of arena_native (build-atari-debug).
